author: Acharya Charak · ~400 BCE
subject: Charak Samhita
desc: Ayurveda ka sabse pramukh grantha, jisme internal medicine (Kaya Chikitsa), rog-nidaan aur chikitsa siddhant vistar se varnit hain.

author: Acharya Sushruta · ~600 BCE
desc: Shalya chikitsa (surgery) par kendrit granth — plastic surgery jaisi ancient techniques ka varnan bhi ismein milta hai.

author: Vagbhata · ~7th century CE
desc: Charak aur Sushruta dono ke gyaan ko sankshep mein prastut karta hai — Ayurveda ke aath angon ka sarvangeen vivaran.

author: Bhavamishra · 16th century CE
subject: Dravyaguna
desc: Aushadhiyon (herbs, minerals) ka vistrit varnan — dravyaguna shastra ka mahatvapurn granth.

author: Madhavakara · ~7th century CE
subject: Roga Nidan
desc: Rog-nidaan (diagnosis) par kendrit — lakshan aur karan ke aadhar par rogon ka vargikaran.

author: Sharangdhara · 13th century CE
subject: Rasashastra & Bhaishajya
desc: Aushadhi nirman vidhi (pharmaceutical processes) aur nadi-pariksha (pulse diagnosis) ka vivaran.

author: Govinda Das Sen · 18th century CE
subject: Rasashastra & Bhaishajya
desc: Bhaishajya Kalpana ka vistrit granth, jismein vibhinn rogon ke liye aushadhi nirmaan aur yogon ka varnan hai.
